name: @monorepo/api-contract
description: OpenAPI definitions and generated TypeScript clients

scripts.openapi:check:
orval && prettier --write src/generated && git diff --exit-code src/generated || (echo '
❌ Error: OpenAPI generated files are out of sync.

🔧 To fix locally:
   cd projects
   pnpm openapi:generate
   pnpm format
   git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit

📖 See: docs/05_development/openapi_workflow.md
' && exit 1)
